heading: Today
text: Patches of fog early, burning off to sunshine, mixed with clouds.  A localized shower in NY this morning, then scattered afternoon showers or a thunderstorm, mostly likely in NY.  Highs in the 70s to near 80.  Winds increasing from the south 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: Scattered evening showers or storms, then partly cloudy.  More clouds, and showers developing in NY after midnight, spreading through Quebec and VT.  Lows in the 50s, a few 40s northeast.  Winds becoming south 10 to 15 mph from the Green Mountains west, light east.

heading: Thursday
text: Occasional rain and showers.  A chance of afternoon thunderstorms.  Highs in the upper 60s to low 70s east and north of I-89, in the 70s west and south.  Winds increasing from the south and southeast 10 to 20 mph, gusting 30 to 40 mph.
